name: Ichiran Ramen — Shibuya
recommendation: Perfect 24H spot to eat right after the midnight landing brief. The spicy tonkotsu ramen is a lifesaver and the solo booths mean zero small talk when you're running on no sleep.

name: Matsumoto Kiyoshi — Ueno
recommendation: Best pharmacy to stock up on Hada Labo lotion and Cabin steam eye masks before the long-haul back. Open late and the Ueno branch almost never runs out of the good sunscreen.

name: Blue Bottle — Williamsburg
recommendation: Opens at 6am — clutch when your body clock is still five hours ahead. Grab the New Orleans cold brew, sit by the window, and watch Brooklyn wake up before the crew bus rolls.

name: Xi'an Famous Foods — Midtown
recommendation: Hand-pulled spicy cumin lamb noodles five minutes from the layover hotel. Cheap, fast, and exactly the kind of warm carb hit you need after a red-eye into JFK.
